query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `regulation_sources` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `shortCode` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `discipline` enum('altalanos','epiteszet','tuzvedelmi','energetika','statika','gepeszet','villamos','geotechnika','kozlekedes','tajepiteszet','egyeb') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'altalanos',
  `sourceType` enum('njt','netjogtar','eurlex','mszt','jogtar','epitesijog','pdf','url') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'njt',
  `sourceUrl` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `content` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `contentFetchedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `s3Key` varchar(512) DEFAULT NULL,
  `isActive` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `platform_credentials` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `platform` enum('mszt','jogtar','epitesijog','eurlex') NOT NULL,
  `displayName` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `username` varchar(320) DEFAULT NULL,
  `encryptedPassword` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('untested','connected','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'untested',
  `lastConnectedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `lastError` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

ALTER TABLE `analyses`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `planDocuments` json DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `regulationSourceIds` json DEFAULT NULL;

  `sourceType` enum('njt','netjogtar','eurlex','mszt','jogtar','epitesijog','pdf','url') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'njt',
  `sourceUrl` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `content` text DEFAULT NULL,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `platform_credentials` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `displayName` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `username` varchar(320) DEFAULT NULL,
  `encryptedPassword` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('untested','connected','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'untested',
  `lastConnectedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `lastError` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)

ALTER TABLE `analyses`
